articles.title: Tokyo Inflation Slowdown Unlikely to Derail BOJ Rate Hike
articles.excerpt: Tokyo’s key inflation gauge unexpectedly cooled to the slowest pace in four years, complicating the messaging while not necessarily derailing an expected interest-rate hike from the Bank of Japan as early as next month.
